terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms and conditions for the {{company}} service

sections.heading: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By creating an account and using {{company}}, you agree to these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

sections.heading: 2. Service Description
sections.body: {{company}} provides an online platform for creating, sending, and tracking commercial proposals for freelancers and small businesses.

sections.heading: 3. Account Registration
sections.body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and for all activities under your account. Notify us immediately of any unauthorized use.

sections.heading: 4. Acceptable Use
sections.body: You agree to use the platform only for lawful purposes. Offensive, fraudulent, or rights-infringing content is prohibited.

sections.heading: 5. Plans and Billing
sections.body: We offer a limited free tier and paid plans. Charges occur at the start of each cycle. You may cancel anytime; no prorated refunds.

sections.heading: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: The service is provided 'as is'. We are not liable for indirect losses. Always back up important data.

sections.heading: 7. Changes
sections.body: We may update these terms. Material changes will be communicated by email or in-app.

sections.heading: 8. Contact
sections.body: Questions? Reach us at {{email}}.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How {{company}} collects and protects your data

sections.heading: 1. Data We Collect
sections.body: We collect: name, email, billing data (when applicable), client and proposal data you create, and technical data (IP, browser, page views).

sections.heading: 2. How We Use It
sections.body: To deliver the service, process payments, improve the platform, send account communications, and meet legal obligations.

sections.heading: 3. Sharing
sections.body: We do not sell your data. We share only with infrastructure providers (hosting, email, payments) under confidentiality agreements.

sections.heading: 4. Your Rights (GDPR/LGPD)
sections.body: You can request access, correction, deletion, or portability of your data anytime by emailing {{email}}.

sections.heading: 5. Security
sections.body: We apply encryption in transit and at rest, access controls, and regular backups.

sections.heading: 6. Retention
sections.body: Data is retained while your account is active. After cancellation, personal data is deleted within 90 days unless legally required.

sections.heading: 7. Cookies
sections.body: We use essential cookies for authentication and preferences. See our Cookie Policy.

sections.heading: 8. DPO Contact
sections.body: Privacy inquiries: {{email}}.

sections.heading: 1. What are cookies
sections.body: Small files stored on your device to remember preferences and keep you signed in.

sections.heading: 2. Cookies we use
sections.body: Only essential ones: authentication session, language, and display preferences. No third-party tracking.

sections.heading: 3. Management
sections.body: You can block cookies in your browser, but features like staying signed in may be affected.

sections.heading: 4. More info
sections.body: Questions? Email {{email}}.
